title: Nora Chamaa and the Vision Behind Veiled
excerpt: From a deep desire to make modest fashion feel effortless and beautiful — the story of how Nora Chamaa built Veiled into a brand that dresses Muslim women with intention, giving back to communities with every purchase.
pullQuote: A brand built on the belief that modest women deserve fashion that is elevated, intentional, and rooted in something greater than style.

interview.question: The Brand
interview.answer: Veiled was founded by Nora Chamaa with a single, clear conviction — that modest fashion should never feel like a compromise. Growing up as a Muslim woman navigating a fashion industry that rarely considered her, Nora set out to build something different. Veiled is a brand rooted in intentionality, offering elevated modest wear for women who want to look beautiful without sacrificing their values. A portion of every sale goes toward supporting Muslim communities worldwide, making each purchase a small act of contribution.

interview.question: The Store
interview.answer: Veiled's flagship store is a physical expression of everything the brand stands for — clean, minimal, and welcoming. Located in New Jersey, the storefront has become a destination for modest fashion lovers in the tri-state area who want to see, feel, and try on pieces in person. The space reflects Nora's design sensibility: understated, refined, and built around the customer experience. Online, Veiled ships across the United States, bringing that same sense of care directly to women's doorsteps.

interview.question: The Mission
interview.answer: What sets Veiled apart is not just the clothing — it is the commitment behind it. Nora built Veiled with purpose woven into the business model. A portion of all sales supports Muslim communities worldwide, a value that resonates deeply with her customer base. For Nora, fashion is never just about what you wear — it is about what you stand for. Veiled continues to grow as a brand where style and substance are never in conflict.

title: Nada and the Vision Behind Merrachi
excerpt: From a living room in the Netherlands to modest fashion destinations around the world — the story of how Merrachi was built on heritage, craft, and a deep belief that Muslim women deserve beautiful clothes.
pullQuote: A brand rooted in Moroccan heritage and European craft, built for Muslim women around the world.

interview.question: The Brand
interview.answer: Merrachi was founded by Nada Merrachi, a Dutch-Moroccan designer who grew up between two worlds — the clean lines of European fashion and the richness of Moroccan textile tradition. Drawing on both, she began creating modest pieces that felt contemporary and culturally rooted at the same time. What started as a small creative endeavor became one of the most recognized names in modest fashion.

interview.question: The Craft
interview.answer: Merrachi is known for its embroidery, carefully considered silhouettes, and an aesthetic that feels both elevated and deeply personal. Each collection reflects Nada's commitment to designing pieces that honor tradition without being bound by it — clothes made for celebrations, ceremonies, and the everyday moments that matter.

interview.question: The Reach
interview.answer: Today, Merrachi ships globally and has found its way into the wardrobes of women across the United States, Europe, and beyond. The brand has built a loyal community drawn to its quality and its point of view — modest fashion that does not ask you to compromise on beauty or identity.
